overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing exploration of a coastal cave system with transparent glass walkways overlooking turquoise ocean water. The player discovers a dead body near a metal door before continuing along the cliffside path toward a concrete building. High-quality game engine rendering with realistic lighting and ocean physics.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cave walkway with transparent glass floor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cave tunnel toward the metal door at the end, pistol raised

entered.detail: rough textured rock ceiling with hanging vines and stalactites
transparent glass floor panels revealing water below
turquoise blue ocean water visible through cave opening
metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway
large natural rock pillar supporting the cave ceiling
industrial metal door with warning stripes at the end of the cave

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a semi-covered coastal cave with a transparent glass walkway floor. Natural rock formations mix with industrial elements, with turquoise ocean water visible through the cave opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave interior with security door and evidence of violence

events.description: discovering a dead body in an orange vest slumped against the concrete wall near the metal door
player stops walking and crouches down to examine the dead body closely

agents.ego_description: approaching the dead body and examining it closely while crouched, weapon still in hand

notable_agents.action: dead worker in orange safety vest lying against concrete wall with blood pooling on floor

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall with bullet holes and blood splatter
dark red blood stains on the concrete wall and floor
industrial hazard stripes on the door frame and floor edges

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the end of the cave where a metal door is set into the rock wall. A dead worker in an orange safety vest lies against the wall amidst blood splatter and bullet holes. The player stops to examine the body closely.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside walkway under rock overhang

events.description: exiting the cave interior back onto the glass walkway overlooking the open ocean
player turns to look at the rocky coastline and waves crashing against the cliffs below

agents.ego_description: moving back out onto the walkway and observing the ocean, rocky shoreline, and coastal features

entered.detail: jagged rock formations and cliffs along the shoreline with waves crashing

segments.scene_description: The player moves back out onto the glass walkway, transitioning from the enclosed cave to the open coastal view. The camera pans to show the turquoise ocean, rocky cliffs, and waves crashing against the shore while moving along the cliffside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path alongside concrete industrial building

events.description: approaching the concrete building structure at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal path toward the concrete building entrance, scanning the area

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete structure with ventilation grilles and industrial details
large metal air vent on the side of the concrete building
white information or safety board mounted on the concrete wall
metal staircase leading up the side of the building

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a concrete industrial building at the end of the coastal walkway. The scene opens to full sky exposure with the brutalist structure on the left and the ocean continuing to the right. The path leads toward a staircase and building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered depths of a coastal cave out toward an exposed industrial complex on a cliffside. It begins by moving across a transparent glass walkway where natural rock formations blend with industrial elements, with turquoise ocean water visible through a distant opening. As the camera reaches the end of the cave, the view narrows to focus on a metal door and a dead worker in an orange safety vest lying amidst blood splatter and bullet holes. The scene then shifts back onto the glass path, transitioning from the enclosed cavern to an expansive coastal vista of rocky cliffs and crashing waves. Finally, the camera moves along the cliffside path as the environment opens to full sky exposure, leading toward a brutalist concrete building and its entrance.
